task_completion.description: ReqView application is open with the SRS document displayed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ReqView window is visible, and the 'SRS' document is selected in the project pane or visible in the main document view.

task_completion.description: The first requirement in the document table is located and selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The first row in the document table is highlighted or has focus, indicating it is selected for duplication.
A new requirement row appears in the table, typically right below the first requirement, sharing similar attributes (like ID structure or custom fields) before modification.

task_completion.description: The description of the duplicated requirement is updated to the target text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The description field of the new requirement exactly reads: 'The system shall enforce role-based access control (RBAC) for all administrative interfaces.'

task_completion.description: The project is saved after modifications.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The save button is clicked, a save dialog is confirmed, or there is no 'unsaved changes' indicator (such as an asterisk) next to the project name in the title bar.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the ReqView GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show mouse clicks, context menus, or keyboard shortcuts being used within the ReqView application interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor to modify the project files directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal or text editor (e.g., nano, vim, gedit, VS Code) is shown editing 'SRS.json' or any other project files.

integrity.description: The requirement was duplicated using the application's duplicate feature, not just manually typed as a new requirement.
integrity.visual_evidence: The context menu showing 'Duplicate' or a similar action is visible, or the new requirement initially shares all other attributes with the first requirement.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target document is 'SRS.json' within the 'duplicate_requirement_project' directory. The requirement count must increase by at least 1. The duplicated requirement must exactly contain the description text: 'The system shall enforce role-based access control (RBAC) for all administrative interfaces.'
